---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What situation does this feature address?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? Be specific about trigger phrases, output format, and behavior.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why is your proposal better?

## Impact on simplicity

This is a single-file product. How does this feature maintain that simplicity?
